events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Zuckerberg San Francisco General for client 1042. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Parsing referral
events.detail: HL7-style discharge summary detected. Extracting diet orders, allergy list, and hard nutritional limits.

events.title: Diet orders identified
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic + cardiovascular. Allergy: peanut. Sodium ceiling 600 mg/meal, carbohydrates 45–60 g/meal.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Preferences captured: Filipino cuisine, dislikes lentils, cooking ability: microwave-only, 7 meals/week, zone: Tenderloin.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Profile validated. Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. These are exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints first, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Pancit Bihon
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 63 g outside 45–60 g range. Hard constraint: cannot be scored down, must be removed.

events.title: Rejected: Heart-Healthy Beef Kaldereta
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 43 g outside 45–60 g range. Hard constraint: cannot be scored down, must be removed.

events.title: Rejected: Lumpiang Sariwa
events.detail: Excluded — allergen: contains peanut. Hard constraint: cannot be scored down, must be removed.

events.title: Matched: Low-Sodium Chicken Adobo with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 426/600 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 45–60) ✓, no peanut ✓. Sourced from today's kitchen batch.

events.title: Matched: Baked Bangus with Garlic Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 396/600 mg ✓, carbs 47 g (target 45–60) ✓, no peanut ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/600 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 45–60) ✓, no peanut ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Tinola with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 412/600 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 45–60) ✓, no peanut ✓.

events.title: Matched: Pork Sinigang with Brown Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 460/600 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–60) ✓, no peanut ✓.

events.title: Shortfall detected
events.detail: Only 4 compliant servings available from current stock against a 7-meal plan. Escalating shortfall to Kitchen Planning; composing grocery bundle for remaining gap days.

events.title: Aggregating unmet demand
events.detail: Compliant Filipino-style, diabetic + heart-healthy meals are stock-constrained across today's queue. Evaluating a production batch against remaining capacity.

events.title: Batch scheduled: Low-Sodium Chicken Adobo
events.detail: Batch B1: 20 servings, 2 labor hours, fits today's remaining capacity (42 h available, 6 equipment slots). Recipe meets 600 mg sodium ceiling at 426 mg/serving.

events.title: Donation D001 triaged
events.detail: Incoming jasmine rice donation (12 × 50 lb) classified as kitchen ingredient — condition good, no allergens. Routing to batch B1.

events.title: Donation D007 triaged
events.detail: Chicken thighs (9 cases) — cold chain intact. Routing to batch B1 as primary protein.

events.title: Grocery kit composed
events.detail: Gap of 2 day(s) covered with a microwave-only kit: Instant Oatmeal (unsweetened, 10-pack), Low-Sodium Canned Black Beans, Frozen Mixed Vegetables (1 lb), Low-Sodium Vegetable Soup (microwavable), Fresh Apples (3-pack). All items peanut-free; numbered prep steps limited to microwave use.

events.title: Scheduling pickup
events.detail: Client zone is Tenderloin. Pickup batch R-TEND-1 is prepared for the 10:00–12:00 window with cold-chain margin.

events.title: Pickup scheduled
events.detail: Meals for client 1042 will be ready for pickup 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00 (batch R-TEND-1, Tenderloin group). Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1042: 5 compliant meals (1 from batch B1) + grocery kit covering 2 day(s). 0 hard-constraint violations. Total pipeline time: 0.7 min.
